patches.find: status downgraded in the same commit to pending_independent_verification, with an explicit honest_caveat that 'independent raw-data reproduct
patches.replace: the entry's status field was set to pending_independent_verification when the key was added, with an explicit honest_caveat that 'independent raw-data reproduct
patches.rationale: Claim that status was 'downgraded' implies a prior confirmed state, which change file chg-20260417-1620-004 does not evidence. The key was newly created as pending. Reword to 'the entry's status field was set to ... when the key was added'.

patches.find: acknowledge-without-fix, three instances in one commit (6e06efb, 2026-04-17). This is the third parallel documentary
patches.replace: acknowledge-without-fix, at least three instances in commit 6e06efb (2026-04-17). This is one of at least three parallel documentary
patches.rationale: ai_manifest.json registry_semantics (chg-20260417-1620-005) is a fourth parallel self-caveat from the same 24-hour window. Change 'three' to 'at least three' to be defensible. Also standardize 'in one commit' to 'in commit 6e06efb'.

patches.find: the user-facing surface still carries the duplicate label and the aggregate count still reflects it.
patches.replace: the user-facing surface still carries the duplicate label for two different claims — one confirmed, one pending. The disambiguation is machine-only.
patches.rationale: WIN-058 has one CONFIRMED and one PENDING badge. Only the confirmed one contributes to the headline count, so 'aggregate count still reflects it' (implying inflation) is overstated. Rewrite to accurately describe the collision as a labeling problem, not a tally inflation. WIN-062 (both CONFIRMED) correctly carries the tally-inflation claim.

patches.find: the author downgraded the κ claim from the headline 'confirmed' tally to pending inside the same commit.
patches.replace: the new claim_key registers this entry as pending_independent_verification from the outset, with an honest caveat that independent reproduction is required.
patches.rationale: No evidence of a prior 'confirmed' state for win-058-bedrock-kappa in the change files. The entry was newly created as pending. Cannot claim it was 'downgraded from confirmed'.
